LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DIVIDEND SOLAR FINANCE LLC'S HEARING ON ITS PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT IN CONFORMANCE WITH THE AWARD. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING WAS HEARING REQUIRED. THE COURT IS NOT CLEAR IF THE PETITION WAS GRANTED SINCE THE REGISTER OF ACTIONS INDICATES THAT THIS PETITION WAS GRANTED ON DECEMBER 5, 2022. calendar.matters:
Second Amended Notice Of Hearing On Its Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformance With The Award
Off Calendar Feb-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Lindsey Kress, Esq. (415) 318-8810. LOCKE LORD LLP for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DIVIDEND SOLAR FINANCE LLC'S Hearing On Its Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformance With The Award

Grant. No opposition filed. In addition, the court vacates the ruling of 12/5/22 as issued in error.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK)

Dividend Solar Finance Llc'S Amended Notice Of Hearing On Its Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformance With The Award
Off Calendar Jan-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court rules as follows:

PETITIONER DIVIDEND SOLAR FINANCE LLC'S Hearing On Its Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformance With The Award.

The Court's tentative ruling was Hearing required. The Court is not clear if the petition was granted since the register of actions indicates that this petition was granted on December 5, 2022. The matter is off calendar for failure to appear by parties.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

Dividend Solar Finance Llc'S Notice Of Hearing On Its Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformance With The Award
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER DIVIDEND SOLAR FINANCE LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformance With The Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Dividend Solar Finance LLC's unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
